blended.narrative: Monarch Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 10,533 ft. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: overcast, highs of 43°F, gusts to 45 mph.
Sunday: 1.6" of snow, highs of 39°F, gusts to 51 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 8" over the past week. Current depth: 25".
